DemoClass.title: Experience Our Teaching Style for Free
DemoClass.description: Not sure if Gyaan is right for you? Join a free, live demo class to experience our interactive learning environment before committing.
DemoClass.benefit1Desc: Ask questions and get immediate feedback from expert instructors.
DemoClass.benefit2Desc: Receive free study materials and resources after the session.

AboutMe.name: Anwar Hossain
AboutMe.title: Passionate about empowering students through language.
AboutMe.bio1: With over a decade of experience in language instruction, I have helped thousands of students achieve their fluency goals.
AboutMe.bio2: My teaching philosophy focuses on practical, real-world communication and building genuine confidence in my students.

Features.description: We provide a world-class educational experience designed to help you master English effectively.
Features.feature1Desc: Learn from certified professionals with years of global teaching experience.
Features.feature2Desc: Engaging and up-to-date materials tailored for real-world English application.
Features.feature3Desc: Study at your own pace with 24/7 access to our comprehensive resources.
Features.feature4Desc: Join thousands of students who have successfully achieved their language goals.
Features.feature5Desc: Enhance your professional vocabulary to unlock international job opportunities.

Courses.description: Explore our hand-picked selection of premium courses designed to take your English proficiency to the next level.
Courses.course1Desc: Deep dive into complex sentence structures and punctuation for flawless writing.
Courses.course2Desc: Learn professional vocabulary and communication strategies for the corporate world.
Courses.course3Desc: Unleash your imagination and master the art of storytelling and descriptive writing.
Courses.course4Desc: Comprehensive training to achieve your target band score in reading, writing, and speaking.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about Gyaan and our courses.
FAQ.a1: Our classes are conducted live online via Zoom. All sessions are also recorded and available for replay for enrolled students.
FAQ.q2: Do I need prior English knowledge to enroll?
FAQ.a2: No. We have courses designed for all levels — from beginner to advanced. We recommend taking our free demo class first to find the right fit.
FAQ.q3: How long does each course take to complete?
FAQ.a3: Course duration varies. Most courses run from 4 to 12 weeks with 2-3 live sessions per week. You can check course-specific details on the Courses page.
FAQ.q4: Is there a certificate upon completion?
FAQ.a4: Yes. All students who complete the course and pass the final assessment receive a certificate of completion from Gyaan.
FAQ.q5: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
FAQ.a5: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee. If you are not happy with the course within the first week, we will refund you completely — no questions asked.
FAQ.a6: Simply book a free demo class to experience our teaching style, then enroll in the course that best fits your goals. Click 'Book Free Demo Now' to get started!

WhyGyaan.pageDescription: Discover why Gyaan is the right choice for your language learning journey.
WhyGyaan.heroSubtitle: We go beyond traditional teaching methods to provide an immersive, interactive, and effective language learning experience tailored for you.
WhyGyaan.missionDesc: To empower individuals with confident communication skills, opening doors to global opportunities and personal growth through accessible, high-quality English education.
WhyGyaan.visionDesc: To be the leading platform for language mastery, where innovation meets education, creating a community of fluent, global-minded communicators.

CoursesPage.pageDescription: Explore our wide range of English language courses designed for all proficiency levels.
CoursesPage.heroSubtitle: Find the perfect course to elevate your English proficiency. From grammar to business communication, we have something for everyone.
CoursesPage.course5Desc: Start your journey and learn to hold basic everyday conversations confidently.
CoursesPage.course6Desc: Master the art of crafting clear, concise, and professional business emails.

TestimonialsPage.pageDescription: Read how Gyaan has transformed the communication skills and careers of our learners.
TestimonialsPage.heroSubtitle: Discover how our community is leveraging Gyaan to shatter language barriers and achieve their personal and professional goals.
TestimonialsPage.t1Text: Gyaan completely transformed my professional communication. The business English course was exactly what I needed to confidently interview at top tech companies.
TestimonialsPage.t2Text: Thanks to the IELTS preparation course, I secured a band score of 8.0! The instructors are expert and the platform is so intuitive.
TestimonialsPage.t3Text: Flexible learning hours and world-class curriculum. I improved my business vocabulary dramatically in just three months while working full-time.
TestimonialsPage.t4Text: The creative writing workshop unleashed my imagination. The feedback from instructors is invaluable and the community is super supportive.

ContactPage.pageDescription: Get in touch with Gyaan. We are here to help you with your English language learning journey.
ContactPage.heroSubtitle: Have a question or want to learn more? Drop us a message, and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactPage.contactInfoDesc: Reach out to us through any of the following channels.
